enhance.title: Enhance & Upscale
enhance.desc: Sharpen, denoise, and boost any clip to higher clarity.

transform.title: Transform & Effects
transform.desc: Face swap, lip sync, anime styles, filters, and motion.

edit.title: Edit & Extend
edit.desc: Cut, extend, restyle, and clean up your footage.

create.title: Create & Animate
create.desc: Bring stills to life and generate cinematic sound.

detail.subtitle: AI-powered studio tool
detail.editPromptPlaceholder: Describe the change you want in the video…
detail.unavailable: This tool isn’t connected yet. Models will appear after seeding.
detail.maxDurationNotice: Best results with clips up to {{seconds}}s.
detail.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for this estimate.
detail.previewHint: See what this tool can do
detail.previewFooter: Your result will appear here after you create

descriptions.video-upscaler: Push resolution and detail so every frame feels crisp and cinema-ready.
descriptions.video-enhancer: Restore clarity, color, and polish across soft or compressed footage.
descriptions.lip-sync: Match mouth movement to any voice track with natural timing.
descriptions.face-swap-video: Swap faces across clips while keeping lighting and motion intact.
descriptions.video-background-remover: Isolate subjects and clear backgrounds in a single pass.
descriptions.remove-subtitles-from-video: Clean burned-in captions without wrecking the scene.
descriptions.ai-video-extender: Continue the shot beyond the last frame with coherent motion.
descriptions.ai-video-editor: Restructure, trim, and restyle footage with studio-grade AI edits.
descriptions.video-to-video: Restyle an entire clip into a new look while keeping the action.
descriptions.animate-a-picture: Turn a still image into smooth motion with cinematic life.
descriptions.ai-sound-effect-generator: Generate sound design that fits the mood of your scene.
descriptions.denoise-video: Remove grain and compression noise while protecting fine detail.
descriptions.ai-dance-generator: Animate characters into dance performances from a reference.
descriptions.video-to-anime-ai: Convert live footage into stylized anime motion.
descriptions.ai-video-filters: Apply cinematic looks and creative filters across the timeline.
descriptions.anime-video-enhancer: Sharpen anime frames and lift line work without muddy artifacts.
descriptions.motion-control: Guide camera and subject motion with precise creative control.
